name: reva-turbo
description: The Rev A Manufacturing PM copilot — full RFQ-to-delivery workflow with CRM, memory, and 48 skills. Paste your key in chat and you're in; bring your own CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Attio, Pipedrive) or use the bundled Nakatomi + AutoMem defaults.
modelRationale: Opus 4.6 — the 46 PM skills span RFQ intake, China sourcing, compliance routing, and quality gates; Opus's depth earns its keep on the judgment calls (scope of work reads, NCR triage, export-control checks). Sonnet 4.6 is a viable fallback for pure status-update work.

postInstall.description: Install docx converter dependencies for Word report generation.

requirements.node: >= 18 (required — mcp-remote bridges plugin stdio MCP to the HTTP router)
